spec_match.rationale: Slotted content reflowing when host container changes — exact behaviour the spec change unblocks.

interactive.rationale: Resizer drives breakpoints with simulated pre-130 contrast mode.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises drag-the-resizer + pre-130 simulation — page delivers both.

edge_cases.rationale: Has both Chrome 130 and simulated pre-130 modes — useful contrast.
